stemHtml: In the context of aviation and loadings on an aircraft`s structure…

options.a: stress of a material is often known as the Young`s modulus of elasticity.
options.b: stress is the ratio of the change in length to the original length of a loaded structure.
options.c: strain is a measure of the deformation of a loaded structure.
options.d: the definitions of stress and strain are interchangeable.
